description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a matte black finish, featuring a rectangular screen and a full keyboard layout. The screen displays a pixelated interface with various colored blocks, including a prominent white crosshair in the center and a purple square in the upper right. The keyboard is detailed with individual keys, a blue touchpad on the right palm rest, and a dark gray palm rest area. The laptop's hinge is visible, connecting the screen and keyboard, and the overall design is slim and angular. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the exterior. The laptop is accompanied by a small, cubic beige object with a green top, which appears to be a separate item.
description: A matte black laptop with a detailed keyboard, blue touchpad, and a pixelated interface on the screen. The design is slim, angular, and modern, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open laptop with the screen and keyboard visible, as well as a beige cube behind it.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the laptop's lid, with the beige cube to the right.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the open screen, keyboard, and the beige cube in front of the laptop.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard, blue touchpad, and the pixelated screen interface, with the beige cube to the left.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and on, displaying a pixelated interface with various colored blocks and a central crosshair.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and blue touchpad; no numeric keypad visible.
